_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Kuo enyi, wee banye.
speakFriend.description: E wuru Liana Banyan ka o mepee n'olu nile. Asusụ nosọbụ nọọ na ihe nrite ntụgharị otu.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Ndepụta asụsụ na ọnụahịa Marks bụ nke oge a. Marks bụ tokens isonye, ọ bụghị equity.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Tụgharịa Liana Banyan n'asụsụ {{language}}. Nweta {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Asụsụ isi -- enweghị mkpa ihe nrite.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Olu Onye Guzobe: Ihe Kpatara Okwu Ndị a
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Okwu ọ bụla n'isi ihe a nwere ihe kpatara aha ya. Mbụ nke aha 26 dị mkpa.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Otú Ihe Nrite Ntụgharị Si Arụ Ọrụ
speakFriend.step1Body: Mepee Ihe Nrite Ntụgharị site n'Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tụgharịa eriri nile dị mkpa. Zipụ site na Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Mgbe ọ nabatara, i nweta Marks ma a debanye aha gị na IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Kuo enyi, wee banye."

languageSwitcher.tip: Jiri paswọọdị asụsụ dị iche iche na Ọnụ ụzọ Durin ka i mepee ahụmahụ pụrụ iche!
